name: Thai Spicy Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chicken, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare garnishes: ground peanuts for garnish, lemon wedges, cucumber slices, and chopped coriander.
2. Soak the rice noodles in cold water for 2-3 hours and drain just before use (or partially cook other thin noodles and allow to cool).
3. In a bowl, mix together fish sauce, lime juice, tomato puree, sugar, and red pepper flakes; set aside.
4. Process peanuts into at least half a cup, plus extra for garnish.
5. Heat oil in a large wok over high heat.
6. Brown garlic in the oil.
7. Add chicken, tofu, and shrimp to the wok and sauté until lightly browned.
8. Add eggs and continue to stir-fry.
9. Add the drained rice noodles and sauce mixture; stir-fry for about 3 minutes.
10. Add peanuts, bean sprouts, and scallions; stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
11. Sprinkle with more ground peanuts.
12. Serve immediately with lemon wedges, cucumber slices, and coriander.
